attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SMTA.REFERENCE_ACCOUNT
	,SMTA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
	,SMTA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
	,SMTA.CREATION_DATE
	,SMTA.CREATED_BY
	,SMTA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
	,SMTA.ORGANIZATION_ID
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_DATE
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID
	,SMTA.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE
	,SMTA.BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE
	,SMTA.CONTRA_SET_ID
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_ID
	,SMTA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_VALUE
	,SMTA.PRIMARY_QUANTITY
	,SMTA.GL_BATCH_ID
	,SMTA.RATE_OR_AMOUNT
	,SMTA.BASIS_TYPE
	,SMTA.RESOURCE_ID
	,SMTA.COST_ELEMENT_ID
	,SMTA.ACTIVITY_ID
	,SMTA.CURRENCY_CODE
	,SMTA.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE
	,SMTA.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE
	,SMTA.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
	,SMTA.REQUEST_ID
	,SMTA.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
	,SMTA.PROGRAM_ID
	,SMTA.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
	,SMTA.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID
	,SMTA.REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID
	,SMTA.GL_SL_LINK_ID
	,SMTA.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
	,SMTA.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID
	,SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	,SMTA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE
	,SMTA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
	,SMTA.REFRESH_DATETIME
	,EXCEPTION_TYPE
	,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
    ,TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID
    ,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
    ,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
    ,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
    ,SMTA.AE_HEADER_ID 
    ,SMTA.AE_LINE_NUM       
    ,LEDGER_AMOUNT  
	,SMTA.FULFILL_LINE_ID

FROM (
	SELECT REFERENCE_ACCOUNT
		,LAST_UPDATE_DATE
		,LAST_UPDATED_BY
		,CREATION_DATE
		,CREATED_BY
		,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
		,ORGANIZATION_ID
		,TRANSACTION_DATE
		,TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID
		,ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE
		,BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE
		,CONTRA_SET_ID
		,TRANSACTION_ID
		,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
		,TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID
		,TRANSACTION_VALUE
		,PRIMARY_QUANTITY
		,GL_BATCH_ID
		,RATE_OR_AMOUNT
		,BASIS_TYPE
		,RESOURCE_ID
		,COST_ELEMENT_ID
		,ACTIVITY_ID
		,CURRENCY_CODE
		,CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE
		,CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE
		,CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
		,REQUEST_ID
		,PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
		,PROGRAM_ID
		,PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
		,ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID
		,REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID
		,GL_SL_LINK_ID
		,USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
		,INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID
		,COALESCE(SS_CD,'CG') AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		,SOURCE_DML_TYPE
		,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
		,REFRESH_DATETIME
		,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
		,AE_HEADER_ID
		,AE_LINE_NUM
		,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
,TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID
,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE       
,LEDGER_AMOUNT  
,FULFILL_LINE_ID
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC
	WHERE COALESCE(SS_CD,'CG') = 'CG'
	) SMTA
WHERE
	/*NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE SMTA.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)

OR*/ NOT EXISTS (
		SELECT 1
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION SM
			,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			,$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT
		WHERE SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMTA.TRANSACTION_ID
			AND SM.SS_CD = SMTA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
			AND SM.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
		)
	/*OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH NJEB
WHERE  SMTA.GL_BATCH_ID = NJEB.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT)*/
	OR NOT EXISTS (
		SELECT 1
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGL
		WHERE SMTA.REFERENCE_ACCOUNT = ENGL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
			AND SMTA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = ENGL.GLOBAL_NAME
		)
		
UNION ALL

SELECT SMTA.REFERENCE_ACCOUNT
	,SMTA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
	,SMTA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
	,SMTA.CREATION_DATE
	,SMTA.CREATED_BY
	,SMTA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
	,SMTA.ORGANIZATION_ID
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_DATE
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID
	,SMTA.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE
	,SMTA.BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE
	,SMTA.CONTRA_SET_ID
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_ID
	,SMTA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID
	,SMTA.TRANSACTION_VALUE
	,SMTA.PRIMARY_QUANTITY
	,SMTA.GL_BATCH_ID
	,SMTA.RATE_OR_AMOUNT
	,SMTA.BASIS_TYPE
	,SMTA.RESOURCE_ID
	,SMTA.COST_ELEMENT_ID
	,SMTA.ACTIVITY_ID
	,SMTA.CURRENCY_CODE
	,SMTA.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE
	,SMTA.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE
	,SMTA.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
	,SMTA.REQUEST_ID
	,SMTA.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
	,SMTA.PROGRAM_ID
	,SMTA.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
	,SMTA.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID
	,SMTA.REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID
	,SMTA.GL_SL_LINK_ID
	,SMTA.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
	,SMTA.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID
	,SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	,SMTA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE
	,SMTA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
	,SMTA.REFRESH_DATETIME
	,EXCEPTION_TYPE
	,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
    ,TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID
    ,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
    ,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
    ,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE   
    ,SMTA.AE_HEADER_ID
	,SMTA.AE_LINE_NUM    
    ,LEDGER_AMOUNT  
	,SMTA.FULFILL_LINE_ID
FROM (
	SELECT REFERENCE_ACCOUNT
		,LAST_UPDATE_DATE
		,LAST_UPDATED_BY
		,CREATION_DATE
		,CREATED_BY
		,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
		,ORGANIZATION_ID
		,TRANSACTION_DATE
		,TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID
		,ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE
		,BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE
		,CONTRA_SET_ID
		,TRANSACTION_ID
		,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
		,TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID
		,TRANSACTION_VALUE
		,PRIMARY_QUANTITY
		,GL_BATCH_ID
		,RATE_OR_AMOUNT
		,BASIS_TYPE
		,RESOURCE_ID
		,COST_ELEMENT_ID
		,ACTIVITY_ID
		,CURRENCY_CODE
		,CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE
		,CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE
		,CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
		,REQUEST_ID
		,PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
		,PROGRAM_ID
		,PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
		,ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID
		,REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID
		,GL_SL_LINK_ID
		,USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
		,INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID
		,SS_CD AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		,SOURCE_DML_TYPE
		,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
		,REFRESH_DATETIME
		,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
		,AE_HEADER_ID
		,AE_LINE_NUM
		,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
		,TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID
		,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
		,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
		,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE       
		,LEDGER_AMOUNT 
		,FULFILL_LINE_ID
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC
	WHERE SS_CD = 'ERPCLOUD'
	) SMTA
WHERE

 NOT EXISTS (
		SELECT 1
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION SM
			,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			,$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT
		WHERE SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMTA.TRANSACTION_ID
			AND SM.SS_CD = SMTA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
			AND SM.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
		)
	/*OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH NJEB
WHERE  SMTA.GL_BATCH_ID = NJEB.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT)*/
	OR NOT EXISTS (
		SELECT 1
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGL
		WHERE SMTA.REFERENCE_ACCOUNT = ENGL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
			AND SMTA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'ERPCLOUD'
		)
	OR NOT EXISTS (
		SELECT 1
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_CLOUD_XLA_AE_LINES XLA,
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EOOGCC,
		$$ETLVWDB.ST_CLOUD_XLA_DISTRIB_LINK XLALINKS
		WHERE XLA.AE_HEADER_ID = SMTA.AE_HEADER_ID
				AND XLA.AE_LINE_NUM = SMTA.AE_LINE_NUM
				AND EOOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = XLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
				AND EOOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME = 'ERPCLOUD'
				AND XLA.AE_HEADER_ID = XLALINKS.AE_HEADER_ID
				AND XLA.AE_LINE_NUM = XLALINKS.AE_LINE_NUM
		)

SELECT 
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY 1 ) + SM_MAX.MAX_VAL AS MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY,
MTD.COST_ELEMENT_CD,
MTD.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD,
MTD.CR_DR_TYPE,
MTD.UNIT_USD_AMT,
MTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY ,
MTD.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY,
MTD.BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
/*MTD.JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT,*/
MTD.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
MTD.SS_CD,
MTD.RU_DR_USD_AMT,
MTD.RU_CR_USD_AMT,
Cast(Current_Timestamp(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0))  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE,
GL_POSTED_FLG
FROM
( SELECT 
Coalesce(ECCE.COST_ELEMENT,'UNKNOWN') AS COST_ELEMENT_CD,
Coalesce(EFLV.MEANING,'UNKNOWN') AS ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN (SCMTA.BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE >0.00) THEN 'CR' ELSE 'DR' END AS CR_DR_TYPE,
Coalesce(SCMTA.RATE_OR_AMOUNT,0.00) AS UNIT_USD_AMT,
Coalesce(SCMTA.PRIMARY_QUANTITY,0.00) AS TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY ,
NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY AS BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY,
Coalesce(ENGL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
/*COALESCE(SCMTA.GL_BATCH_ID,-999) AS JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT ,*/
Coalesce(ENGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,-999) AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
Cast('CG' AS VARCHAR(8))AS SS_CD,
CASE WHEN (BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE < 0.00) THEN BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END AS RU_DR_USD_AMT,
CASE WHEN (BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE > 0.00) THEN BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END AS RU_CR_USD_AMT,
CASE WHEN Coalesce(CXDL.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE,'N') = 'Y'   THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END GL_POSTED_FLG
FROM
(SELECT 
COST_ELEMENT_ID,
ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE,
BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE,
RATE_OR_AMOUNT ,
PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
TRANSACTION_ID,
REFERENCE_ACCOUNT,
GL_BATCH_ID,
INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID,
'CG' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,1 AE,1 AE1
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC
WHERE SS_CD='CG'
--AND TRANSACTION_ID = 148119
UNION ALL
SELECT
 COST_ELEMENT_ID,
ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE,
BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE,
RATE_OR_AMOUNT ,
PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
TRANSACTION_ID,
REFERENCE_ACCOUNT,
GL_BATCH_ID,
INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID,
'CG' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,1 AE,1 AE1
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' AND SS_CD='CG'  ) SCMTA
/*INNER JOIN COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON SCMTA.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME*/
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CST_COST_ELEMENTS ECCE ON 
SCMTA.COST_ELEMENT_ID = ECCE.COST_ELEMENT_ID AND
SCMTA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = ECCE.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES  EFLV 
ON Trim(Coalesce(To_Number(SCMTA.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE),SCMTA.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE)) =Trim(EFLV.LOOKUP_CODE) 
AND SCMTA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = EFLV.GLOBAL_NAME
AND EFLV.lookup_type='CST_ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE' 
AND EFLV.LANG='US'
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION SM 
ON SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT =SCMTA.TRANSACTION_ID AND SM.SS_CD = SCMTA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN
$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT ON SM.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY=NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGL
ON SCMTA.REFERENCE_ACCOUNT= ENGL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
AND SCMTA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=ENGL.GLOBAL_NAME

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 ,EXAH.GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIB_LINKS EXDL , 
                              $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS EXAH
      WHERE EXAH.AE_HEADER_ID  = EXDL.AE_HEADER_ID  AND
            EXDL.GLOBAL_NAME = EXAH.GLOBAL_NAME  AND
            EXAH.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE  ='Y' 
           AND EXDL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE='MTL_TRANSACTION_ACCOUNTS')  CXDL
ON (CXDL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1= SCMTA.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID
 AND CXDL.GLOBAL_NAME = SCMTA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	
/*LEFT JOIN FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH NJEB
ON  COALESCE(SCMTA.GL_BATCH_ID,-999)  = NJEB.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT*/
UNION ALL
 SELECT Coalesce(ECCE.COST_ELEMENT, 'UNKNOWN') AS COST_ELEMENT_CD
            ,Coalesce(EFLV.MEANING, 'UNKNOWN') AS ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD
            ,CASE 
                WHEN XLA.ENTERED_DR > 0
                    THEN 'DR'
                ELSE 'CR'
                END AS CR_DR_TYPE
            ,Abs((Sum(Abs(XLA.ENTERED_DR)) + Sum(Abs(XLA.ENTERED_CR))) / a1.PRIMARY_QUANTITY) AS UNIT_USD_AMT
            ,a1.PRIMARY_QUANTITY AS TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY
            ,NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY AS BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
            ,Coalesce(ENGL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, - 995) AS BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
            ,
            Coalesce(ENGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, - 999) AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
            ,Cast('ERPCLOUD' AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SS_CD
            ,Sum(XLA.ENTERED_DR * - 1) AS RU_DR_USD_AMT
            ,Sum(XLA.ENTERED_CR) AS RU_CR_USD_AMT
            ,CASE 
                WHEN Coalesce(SCMTA1.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y'
                    THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
                END GL_POSTED_FLG
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT transaction_id
                ,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
                ,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
                ,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
                ,PRIMARY_QUANTITY
                ,'ERPCLOUD' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                ,FULFILL_LINE_ID
            FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC  WHERE CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID <> ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID AND SS_CD = 'ERPCLOUD' 
			UNION ALL 
			 SELECT DISTINCT transaction_id
                ,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
                ,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
                ,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
                ,PRIMARY_QUANTITY
                ,'ERPCLOUD' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                ,FULFILL_LINE_ID
				FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' AND SS_CD='ERPCLOUD' AND CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID <> ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
            ) a1
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT DISTINCT TRANSACTION_ID
            ,AE_HEADER_ID
            ,AE_LINE_NUM
            ,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
            ,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
            ,TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID
            ,COST_ELEMENT_ID
            ,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
            ,FULFILL_LINE_ID
            FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC WHERE SS_CD = 'ERPCLOUD'
			UNION ALL
			 SELECT DISTINCT TRANSACTION_ID
            ,AE_HEADER_ID
            ,AE_LINE_NUM
            ,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
            ,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
            ,TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID
            ,COST_ELEMENT_ID
            ,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
            ,FULFILL_LINE_ID
			FROM $$EXCEPDB_DV1.EX_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' AND SS_CD='ERPCLOUD' 
    
            ) SCMTA1 ON a1.FULFILL_LINE_ID = SCMTA1.FULFILL_LINE_ID
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION SM ON SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = a1.TRANSACTION_ID
            AND SM.SS_CD = a1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
        INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT ON SM.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
        LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CST_COST_ELEMENTS ECCE ON SCMTA1.COST_ELEMENT_ID = ECCE.COST_ELEMENT_ID
            AND a1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = ECCE.GLOBAL_NAME
        INNER JOIN (
            SEL AE_HEADER_ID
            ,AE_LINE_NUM
            ,ENTERED_DR
            ,ENTERED_CR
            ,CODE_COMBINATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_CLOUD_XLA_AE_LINES QUALIFY Row_Number() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY AE_HEADER_ID
                    ,AE_LINE_NUM ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC
                    ) = 1
            ) XLA ON (
                XLA.AE_HEADER_ID = SCMTA1.AE_HEADER_ID
                AND XLA.AE_LINE_NUM = SCMTA1.AE_LINE_NUM
                )
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EOOGCC /*CBM CHANGES*/
            ON EOOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = XLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
            AND EOOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME = 'ERPCLOUD'
        LEFT OUTER JOIN (
            SELECT *
            FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT
            WHERE GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG' QUALIFY Row_Number() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY BK_COMPANY_CODE
                    ,BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
                    ,BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
                    ,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
                    ,BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
                    ,BK_PROJECT_CODE ORDER BY CODE_COMBINATION_ID DESC
                    ) = 1
            ) ENGL ON (
                EOOGCC.SEGMENT1 = ENGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT2 = ENGL.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT3 = ENGL.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT4 = ENGL.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT5 = ENGL.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT6 = ENGL.BK_PROJECT_CODE
                AND ENGL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                )
        INNER JOIN (
            SEL AE_HEADER_ID
            ,AE_LINE_NUM
            ,ACCOUNTING_LINE_CODE
            ,ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_CLOUD_XLA_DISTRIB_LINK QUALIFY Row_Number() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY AE_HEADER_ID
                    ,AE_LINE_NUM ORDER BY GES_UPDATE_DATE DESC
                    ) = 1
            ) XLALINKS ON XLA.AE_HEADER_ID = XLALINKS.AE_HEADER_ID
            AND XLA.AE_LINE_NUM = XLALINKS.AE_LINE_NUM
        --AND XLALINKS.ACCOUNTING_LINE_CODE = 'CISCO_COGS_IC_DS'
        LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES EFLV ON OREPLACE(TRIM(XLALINKS.ACCOUNTING_LINE_CODE), '.') = EFLV.LOOKUP_CODE
            AND a1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = EFLV.GLOBAL_NAME
            AND EFLV.lookup_type = 'CST_ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE'
            AND EFLV.LANG = 'US'
        GROUP BY 1
            ,2
            ,3
            ,5
            ,6
            ,7
            ,8
            ,9
            ,12
        
        
        UNION ALL /*US*/
        
        SELECT Coalesce(ECCE.COST_ELEMENT, 'UNKNOWN') AS COST_ELEMENT_CD
            ,Coalesce(EFLV.MEANING, 'UNKNOWN') AS ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD
            ,CASE 
                WHEN XLA.ENTERED_DR > 0
                    THEN 'DR'
                ELSE 'CR'
                END AS CR_DR_TYPE
            ,Abs((Sum(Abs(XLA.ENTERED_DR)) + Sum(Abs(XLA.ENTERED_CR))) / a1.PRIMARY_QUANTITY) AS UNIT_USD_AMT
            ,a1.PRIMARY_QUANTITY AS TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY
            ,NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY AS BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
            ,Coalesce(ENGL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, - 995) AS BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
            ,
            /*COALESCE(SCMTA.GL_BATCH_ID,-999) AS JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT ,*/
            Coalesce(ENGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, - 999) AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
            ,Cast('ERPCLOUD' AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SS_CD
            ,Sum(XLA.ENTERED_DR * - 1) AS RU_DR_USD_AMT
            ,Sum(XLA.ENTERED_CR) AS RU_CR_USD_AMT
            ,CASE 
                WHEN Coalesce(a1.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y'
                    THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
                END GL_POSTED_FLG
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT transaction_id
                ,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
                ,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
                ,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
                ,PRIMARY_QUANTITY
                ,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
                ,'ERPCLOUD' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                ,AE_HEADER_ID
                ,AE_LINE_NUM
                ,COST_ELEMENT_ID
            FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC
            WHERE CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID = ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID AND SS_CD = 'ERPCLOUD' --and TRANSACTION_ID in (442049)
			UNION ALL
			SELECT DISTINCT transaction_id
                ,CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
                ,ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
                ,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
                ,PRIMARY_QUANTITY
                ,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
                ,'ERPCLOUD' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                ,AE_HEADER_ID
                ,AE_LINE_NUM
                ,COST_ELEMENT_ID
			FROM
				$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' AND SS_CD='ERPCLOUD' AND CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID = ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID

            
            
            ) a1
            INNER JOIN 
            ( 
                sel distinct transaction_id,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID ,'ERPCLOUD' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                FROM    $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC
                WHERE   CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID = ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID  AND SS_CD='ERPCLOUD' 
				UNION ALL
				sel distinct transaction_id,CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID ,'ERPCLOUD' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                FROM    $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC
                WHERE   EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' AND SS_CD='ERPCLOUD' AND CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID = ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID   
				
                )a2
                ON a1.CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID = a2.CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID 
            
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION SM ON SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = a2.TRANSACTION_ID
            AND SM.SS_CD = a2.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
        INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT ON SM.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
        LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CST_COST_ELEMENTS ECCE ON a1.COST_ELEMENT_ID = ECCE.COST_ELEMENT_ID
            AND a1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = ECCE.GLOBAL_NAME
        INNER JOIN (
            SEL AE_HEADER_ID
            ,AE_LINE_NUM
            ,ENTERED_DR
            ,ENTERED_CR
            ,CODE_COMBINATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_CLOUD_XLA_AE_LINES QUALIFY Row_Number() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY AE_HEADER_ID
                    ,AE_LINE_NUM ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC
                    ) = 1
            ) XLA ON (
                XLA.AE_HEADER_ID = a1.AE_HEADER_ID
                AND XLA.AE_LINE_NUM = a1.AE_LINE_NUM
                )
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EOOGCC /*CBM CHANGES*/
            ON EOOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = XLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
            AND EOOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME = 'ERPCLOUD'
        LEFT OUTER JOIN (
            SELECT *
            FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT
            WHERE GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG' QUALIFY Row_Number() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY BK_COMPANY_CODE
                    ,BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
                    ,BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
                    ,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
                    ,BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
                    ,BK_PROJECT_CODE ORDER BY CODE_COMBINATION_ID DESC
                    ) = 1
            ) ENGL ON (
                EOOGCC.SEGMENT1 = ENGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT2 = ENGL.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT3 = ENGL.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT4 = ENGL.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT5 = ENGL.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
                AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT6 = ENGL.BK_PROJECT_CODE
                AND ENGL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                )
        INNER JOIN (
            SEL AE_HEADER_ID
            ,AE_LINE_NUM
            ,ACCOUNTING_LINE_CODE
            ,ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_CLOUD_XLA_DISTRIB_LINK QUALIFY Row_Number() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY AE_HEADER_ID
                    ,AE_LINE_NUM ORDER BY GES_UPDATE_DATE DESC
                    ) = 1
            ) XLALINKS ON XLA.AE_HEADER_ID = XLALINKS.AE_HEADER_ID
            AND XLA.AE_LINE_NUM = XLALINKS.AE_LINE_NUM
        --AND XLALINKS.ACCOUNTING_LINE_CODE = 'CISCO_COGS_IC_DS'
        LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES EFLV ON OREPLACE(TRIM(XLALINKS.ACCOUNTING_LINE_CODE), '.') = EFLV.LOOKUP_CODE
            AND a1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = EFLV.GLOBAL_NAME
            AND EFLV.lookup_type = 'CST_ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE'
            AND EFLV.LANG = 'US'
        GROUP BY 1
            ,2
            ,3
            ,5
            ,6
            ,7
            ,8
            ,9
            ,12

) MTD,
(SELECT Coalesce(Max(MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY),0) MAX_VAL
FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL) SM_MAX
WHERE 1=1
